query:
SELECT id, display_name, whatsapp_name, email, lives_remaining, current_streak, longest_streak, total_points, days_complete, ghost_life_used, updated_at FROM participants WHERE LOWER(CONCAT(COALESCE(display_name,''),' ',COALESCE(whatsapp_name,''),' ',COALESCE(email,''))) LIKE '%nay%';
SELECT p.id AS participant_id, p.display_name, dl.day_number, dl.day_complete, dl.points_awarded, dl.submitted_at, dl.created_at, dl.updated_at FROM participants p JOIN daily_logs dl ON dl.participant_id = p.id WHERE LOWER(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.display_name,''),' ',COALESCE(p.whatsapp_name,''),' ',COALESCE(p.email,''))) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY dl.day_number;
